body.title: Gate consults.log behind IGOR_TEST_MODE — .test suffix for fixture traffic
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Consult observe-and-tune Finding 3: 24% of consults.log entries (25/104) are test fixtures (ticket_id=T-test, pursuit_id=GOAL_123). Contaminates the prod log and skews any tuning analysis. Follow the pattern used by other logs: when IGOR_TEST_MODE is set, write to consults.log.test instead.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py (forensic-log path), tests/test_consult_primitive.py (new assertion: test-mode writes to .test suffix).
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — path switch gated on env var. OUT — retroactively cleaning the existing polluted log (observe-and-tune said to filter at analysis-time instead).
**Test plan:** new test sets IGOR_TEST_MODE, runs a consult, asserts .test file exists and main log untouched.
body.approved_plan: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
